summary: Successfully tested Map/List toggle feature on VenueSearchPage. All requested features are working correctly: List/Map view toggle, interactive OpenStreetMap with Leaflet, venue markers with popups showing venue info and View Details button, anchor marker for search location, location search with geocoding, radius filter with visual circle on map, split view on desktop, mobile bottom drawer, and empty state when no venues in radius.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - accessibility enhancement recommended for Sheet component

critical_code_review_comments: VenueMap.js properly handles Leaflet marker icons fix for webpack/react
Custom venue (gold) and anchor (blue) marker icons implemented correctly
Haversine formula for distance calculation is accurate
Geocoding with fallback pattern (known locations -> city centers -> Nominatim API) is well-designed
Client-side radius filtering works correctly for MVP
VenueCard compact mode properly implemented for map sidebar
test_credentials: No login required - public venue search page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (5 venues in Delhi/Gurgaon/Noida area)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map/List toggle feature is fully functional. Uses react-leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles. Known locations (Jaipur Fort, India Gate, etc.) are hardcoded for demo purposes with fallback to Nominatim API. All 5 seed venues have valid coordinates and display on the map.

list_map_toggle.default_list_view: PASS - List view is default, List button active on load
list_map_toggle.toggle_to_map: PASS - Clicking Map button switches to map view
list_map_toggle.toggle_back_to_list: PASS - Can toggle back to list view
list_map_toggle.view_button_active_state: PASS - Correct button highlighted based on current view

map_functionality.venue_markers_gold: PASS - Gold markers appear for venues with coordinates
map_functionality.anchor_marker_blue: PASS - Blue anchor marker shows search/default location
map_functionality.marker_click_popup: PASS - Clicking venue marker shows popup with venue info
map_functionality.popup_view_details: PASS - View Details button navigates to venue detail page
map_functionality.anchor_popup: PASS - Anchor marker popup shows location name and radius info

location_search.search_input_visible: PASS - Location search input appears in map view
location_search.geocode_known_location: PASS - 'Jaipur Fort' geocodes to correct coordinates (26.9855, 75.8513)
location_search.geocode_success_indicator: PASS - Green checkmark with location label shows on success
location_search.map_recenters: PASS - Map recenters to new location after search

radius_filter.radius_circle_drawn: PASS - Dashed circle overlay appears on map when radius set
radius_filter.filter_by_radius: PASS - Venues filtered to those within radius
radius_filter.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No venues found' message when no venues in radius (e.g., Jaipur Fort with 10km)

split_view_desktop.compact_venue_cards: PASS - Compact venue cards in sidebar show thumbnail, name, location, capacity, price
split_view_desktop.sidebar_click_navigates: PASS - Clicking compact card navigates to venue detail

map_anchor_info_bar.shows_source: PASS - Shows source (Location Search / City Center Fallback / Default)
map_anchor_info_bar.shows_radius: PASS - Shows radius when radius filter is set
